titleStmt.title: SII 18.300: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 300. (B.K. No. 56 of 1932-33.) HARAḶAHAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the house of Honnappa Byaḍagi.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the rule of Āhavāditya Vīra-Vikramāditya over Banavāsi Twelve-thousand is dated in Śaka 1136, Śrīmukha, Chaitra Amāvāsyā, Monday, solar eclipse, Saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1213 April 22, Monday. There was a solar eclipse on that day but no Saṁkrānti. The Śaka year cited is the current year. The record which gives the detailed geneology of the Gutta family, says that Vikramāditya II had a sister called Vijayamahādēvi who was married to Siṅginṛipāḷa of Sāntaḷi-maṇḍala and whose son Ballāḷa married Tuḷuvaladēvi, the daughter of Vikramāditya II. It states that Vikramāditya constructed the temple of Tuḷuvalēśvara in the vicinity of the temple of Svayambhu-Sōmanāthadēva at Goṭṭagaḍi on the western bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā, in memory of his daughter Tuḷuvaladēvi who died after giving birth to a son called Bamma. Further it records the grant of the village Guḍḍahāḷapaḷḷi for the worship and offerings to that deity. The recepient of the gift was the Rājaguru Trilōchana-Paṇḍita, the sthānāchārya of the god Sōmanātha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . pāyādvikramabhū
pāḷaṁ pārvvatīparamēśvaraḥ sarvvadā ssarvvagassarvvēśastuḷvalēśvaraḥ . śrī madbhāgī rathībhaṁgurataraḷataraṁgōccaḷaccaṁdraṟē
khōddāmaśrīmauḷigaurīmukhakamaḷavilōḻāṁbakaṁ nīlakaṁṭhaṁ vāmārddhāṁ gāṁgajāliṁgananibiḍakaraṁ dēvadēvaṁ pra
saṁnaṁ prēmaṁbettāgaḷuṁ rakṣisuge tuḷvalēśaṁ mahēśaṁ . bhuvanabyākīrnnapracurataraṁ gāḷisaṁchaṁnaphēnōdbhavanānābhīḷama
tsyaprakaramakaraśuṁḍāḷajāḷapracāra plavanavyāpārakōḷāhaḷajaḷakaḷavisphāragaṁbhīra ghūrṇnārnnavavādaṁ śōbhikuṁ mauktikaśuktilasa
tphaṁkavallīprayuktaṁ . vananidhimēkhaḷāvaniya madhyadoḷoppuva mēru mēruviṁgenaladu dakṣiṇāvaniya bhāratavarṣavadakke
dakṣiṇāvaniyene tāne kuṁtaḷamahītaḷavāmahiyiṁda dakṣiṇāvani banavāsedēsavesaguṁ sakaḷāvaniyoḷu ni
rantaraṁ . Ā banavāseyoḷu negaḻdu beḷuhugesaptatiyoppi tōrkkuvaṁtā baḷiyū rggaḷiṁ palau dēvagrihaṁgaḷi
nūrasārevettā beḷedirddha keyvoladināpurabāhyanivēśadalli tōrppā banadiṁ sarōvara dinurvvigagurvvenikuṁ vi
ḷāsadiṁ . kaṁda . vuttamavene bhūkāṁteya vrittakucakeseva mauktikākṣāvaḷiyaṁ pettanajaṁ calviṁgene guttavoḷalu
karame raṁjikuṁ tanumahiyoḷu . va . Aṁtu sogayisuva guttavoḷala nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ banavāsipanijḻāsiramaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapratipāḷavadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttamirddu jasaṁbetta guttakuḷatiḷakanuṁ caṁ
draguptānvayanumenisida vikramādityabhūpāḷananvayameṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁ . Esevujjē niya puradoḷu vasudhēśaṁ maṁ
tri caṁddiyuṁ tānuṁ saṁtōsadiṁda rājyalīleyoḷesadirdda vīravikramādityanripaṁ . va . Antu negaḷda vikramādityananvayāṁbhōjātara
paraṁpareyoḷu palaṁbararasugaḷiṁ baḷiyamaudāryyavīryya gāṁbhīryya saṁpaṁnanuṁ satyasaṁgrahanuṁ saṁgrāmadhīranumenisi
vīravikramādityaṁ puṭṭi banavāsi maṁḍaḷakkadhipatiyenni negaḷdanātana mahimōṁnati yeṁteṁdaḍe . vri . vōḍadarātiyilla ra
ṇaraṁgadoḷōvade vaṁdi baṁdu kainīḍi daridramaṁ kaḷedu bāḷadarilla śaraṇyavarggadoḷu kēḍinitilla tāne kalidāni pa
dārttha nidhānaneṁdaḍiṁ rūḍhiyoḷāraṇaṁ pogaḷvaraggada vikramabhūmipāḷanaṁ . Ā vibhu vikramāṁkamahipaṁgena
suṁ kaliguttabhūpanuṁ śrīvara jōyidēvanenipirvvarumoppe sutarkkaḷāgiru ttī vasudhātaḷakke vararādaranaṁ
ntaraṁ vānripāḷaraṁdōvade rājyamaṁ taḷadarūrjjitapuṁṇyarenalu dharitriyoḷu . Ā negeḷdirvvarurvviparoḷaggada guttara rāRead dha.
dhināthanoḷu tānesevaḷu haraṁgume sarōruhasaṁjanitaṁge rāṇiyaṁtu naḷinōdaraṁge sirivolu sale padmaladēvi
yoppuvaḷu bhūnute rūpalakṣaṇasamaṁnvite sadguṇayukte dhātriyoḷu . Ā vibhugutta bhūpatigavaggada
padmaladēvirāṇigaṁ dēvakidēvigaṁ tadvaraṁ vasudēvanripaṁgavaṁdu saṁdāvanajākṣanudu bhavipavolu bhuvanastutanoppe
puṭṭidaṁ bhūvikramaṁ vijayadēviralaṁ sahajāteyeṁbinaṁ [. va .] Aṁtu vikramādityaṁ janiyisi guttavoḷalanelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeydanātana rājyavibhavavuṁ pratāpavuṁmaudāryya mumeṁteṁdaḍe . svasti samadhigatapaṁ
camahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ [U]jeniyapuravarādhīśvaraṁ vaṭa(vi) kallavrikṣalāṁchita vijayadhvajaṁ bhuvanara
kṣaṇaikadakṣadakṣiṇabhujaṁ caṁdraguptānvayasudhārṇnavapūrṇnacaṁdraṁ vibhavāma rēṁdraṁ haracaraṇanakhakiraṇa
sāṁdracaṁdrikācakōraṁ gurupadapayōdharānaṁditamayūraṁ māninīmānasarvvasva sūṟekāṟaṁ raṇadoḷnīṟaṁ maṁḍaḷikabhai
ravaṁ Ānaṁditayuvatījananayanakairavaṁ paṁnirvaragaṁḍaṁ samaraśauṁḍaṁ Āhavāditaṁ vīravikramādityaṁ saṁgramabhīmaṁ parā
kramarāmanenisi neva(ga)ḷdanaṁtumalladeyuṁ . vri . bīsuva cāmaraṁ poḷeva sīguri nāḍe viḷāsabhāvamaṁ sūsuva vāranārinika
raṁ varagītaninādavā caturbbhāśegaḷiṁdavōdi neṟe meccipa maṁgaḷapāṭhakarkkaḷiṁ dēpe beḍaṁguvettapevudaggada vikramabhūpa
nōlagaṁ . dhuradhoḷu māṟāntu pēḷi parabaḷamathanaṁ vikramādityabhūpaṁgaṁ bhūparnnilvare māṇadu husiyenasuṁ
baṁdanī saṁda paṁnirvvaragaṁḍaṭha maṁḍaḷikapratatige bhayakridbhairavaṁ vīralakṣmīvara neṁdeṁdūduvākāhaḷakaḷakaḷamaṁ kēḷdu nilvaṁnanā
vaṁ . Ā vibhuvina paṭṭamahādēviyenalu negaḷda paṭṭamādēvi karaṁ bhūvinute vikramāṁka śrīvaranarddāṁgalakṣmi
yene sogayisuvaḷu . vri . kuḍutege vaṁda jahnusuteyallada jāhnavi dakṣayajñadoḷu toḍarada gauri rāvaṇana bā
rige bīḷada sīteyaṁbaraṁbiḍiyaduruṁdhatāsati yenalu kēḻ vikrama bhūmipāḷanoḷu maḍadiyenippa paṭṭamahadēvi
gadārddoreyaṁnyakāṁteyaru . Ā negaḷdirdda paṭṭamahādēvigavā nripa vikramaṁgamā bhūnū(nu)te saṁda tuḷvalavarāṁgane
tāṁ sute jōvidēvanuṁ dānavinōdi vikramanripaṁ sutarādaranaṁtaraṁ samaṁtā naḷi nākṣi tuḷuvalavarāṁganeyoppuvaḷī dharitriyoThe letters naḷi are written below the line in smaller characters.
ḷu . paṭṭamahādēviyariṁ neṭṭane tāṁ kiṟiyanenisi dōrvvaḷadiṁ bhūgiṭṭaḷamene piriyanenalu siṣṭēṣṭapriyanamā(r)tya
caṁdraṁ negaḷdaṁ . va . Ā pradhānana mahimōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . vri . viśasanaraṁgadoḷu toḍare vikramabhūpana maṁtri caṁdano
ḷu kusiyade koḍadarccisade berbbaḷeyāgade beccadubbeyoḷu desegiḍadōḍadaḷkaderdde yāṟade hēḍijara taguḷdu śaṁ
kisadele kāyenuttirade kāduva meygali yāvanurvviyoḷu . Antā mahāpradhānaṁ berasu dēvēṁdranaṁte santā
nasamētanuṁ gōpāḷanaṁte vanitājanamanōharanuṁ kubēranante dhanapatiyumenni rājyaṁgeyvuttippuduṁ tuḷuvaladē
vi janiyisuvudaṟiṁ muṁname tanage sahajāteyenisida vijayamahādēviyaraṁ sūryya vaṁśalalāmanuṁ sāṁ
teḷimaṁḍaḷādhipatiyennidā siṁhabhūpāḷananvayameṁtene pūrvvakāladoḷu jinadatta nripāḷanēḷusāsiradēḷunū
ṟeppattēḷāneverasu bhūtaḷamanāḷdanātaniṁ baḷiya palabararasugaḷiṁdanantaraṁ śrīvallabhaṁ puṭṭi prithvīvallabhanenni negaḷda
nātana kumārōtpattiyeṁtene . śrīvallabhōrvvīpatigaṁ śrīvallabhegeṇeyenippa tuḷuvala dēvi śrīvanitegavudayisidaṁ
bhūvallabhanenni siṁgidēvakṣitipaṁ . Ā siṁganripāḷaṁgaṁ śrīsatigeṇeyenipa vijayadēvi gavādaṁ bhāsuratējaṁ su
tanenalā sakaḷa guṇāḍhyanenipa ballāḷanripaṁ . va . Antu negaḷda kumāraṁ ballāḷaṁgaṁ vikramādityasuteyappa tuḷuva
ladēvigaṁ vikramāṁkanuṁ siṁhabhūpāḷanuṁmirddu mahōtsavadiṁ vivāhōtsāhamaṁ māḍi rājyadoḷu kūḍi su
khadiṁdirddarā daṁpatigaḷirvvaruṁ taṁmoḷparasparasnēhaṁ baḍedirddarā ballāḷaṁgarddhāṁga lakṣmīyenisida tuḷuvala
dēviya rūpaviḷāsa(ṁ)meṁtene . vri . Atiśayabhāgyamaṁ paḍedu saṁcaḷeyallada lakṣmi śāṁtiyoḷu patipala
rilladoppuva dharāṁgane tānenalī dharitriyoḷu pativatiyarkkaḷoḷu savativāḷtanagillada gaṁgeyeṁdaḍī kṣitivo
ḷadārssamaṁ negaḷva tuḷuvaladēviyolaṁnyakāṁteyaru . Ā ballāḷanripaṁgavā tuḷu valadēviprakhyātegaṁ puṭṭidaṁ
śrībaṁmakṣitipāḷa nūrjjitayaśaṁ tatsāṁtaḷīmaṁḍaḷakkābālyaṁ modalāgi bhūpati yenalu sallakṣaṇaṁ sadugu
ṇaṁ lōbaṁ porddada maṁḍaḷīkatiḷakaṁ lōkakke muddeṁbinaṁ . poḍavigaṇaṁ vidhātra vaśameṁbudu tappadenippa māḷkeyiṁ
paḍedu kumāranaṁ negaḷda tuḷuvaladēvi sadūrdhvalōkamaṁ paḍedaḷadaṁte mānavara ciṁtegaḷiṁdame bhāvisalu
nōṁpaḷeṁdoḍadēno dharmmamevalaṁ tanagappuduvāgadippuduṁ taḍeyade mārppuduḷḷanitanī dhareyoḷuvartha
vuḷḷa kāladoḷu . va . Antu tuḷuvaladēvi kālamaneyiduvuduṁmā tuḷuvaladēvige paralōkahitārtthavā
gi vikramādityadēvaṁ taṁnāḷuva dēśadoḷu dakṣiṇavāraṇāsiyenisida tuṁgabhadreya paścimataṭada goṭṭaga
ḍiya kṣētradoḷu svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara śivālayada saṁnidhānadoḷu palavuṁ teṟada citravesadiṁ
tuḷuvalēśvaranāmada śivālayamaṁ māḍisi yādēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ naivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakkaṁ
tapōdhanarāhāradānakkaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvantāgi śakavarṣada 1136 neya śrīmukhasaṁvatsa
rada caitradamavāsye sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatiyapāta puṁṇya tithiyoḷu sakala
dharmmapratipāḷaruṁ sakaḷabrataniratarappa śrīmadrājaguru goṭṭagaḍiya sōmanātha dēvara sthānācāryya
triḷōcanadēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi dakṣiṇagaṁgeyennida tuṁgabhadrātīrada paḍuvaṇa taḍiya guḍḍa
hāḷapaḷḷiyaṁ prasiddhacatussīmāsamētaṁ sarvvabādhe parihāravāgi vikramādityadēvanuṁ śrī(maṁ)
manmahāpradhānaṁ caṁdeyaṇadaṇnayakarssahitavirddu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . gutta
voḷala sthaḷavrittihiriyakeṟeya keḷage kuṁbhēśvarada gaddeyiṁ teṁka vikkamēśvarada gadde Alliṁ mūḍalu
tuḷuvalēśvarada gaddeyarevattalu . kaṁmatadiṁ mūḍalu Ere mattalu Āṟu 6 . Ā grāma
da sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe mūḍalu hirida hāḷa paḍuvaṇavōṇi mēre Āgnēyadalu kaṟalamaḍu teṁkalu bellava
ttada bāgu nairityadalu Eranakoḷa pacchimadalu bīranakoḷa hoṁnāvareya bāgu voṭṭugalla voraḍi naṭṭakallu
vāyāvyadalu naṭṭakallu baḍagalu tuṁgabhadrā . hulluṇiya hāhanūra talevolanalliheṁmā ḍaya baṁ
manakōḍiṁ baḍagaltuḷuvaladēviyargge puṇyārtthavāgi brahmapurige biṭṭa vitti hadinaidakke matta 60 .
Digital edition of SII 18.300 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
